作者: Matt Saha, Y. Henry Wen, Andrew S. Greenspon, Matthew Zimmermann, Kevin J. Palm, Alex Witte, Yin Min Goh, Chao Li, Jonathan Bumstead, Kevin Schädler, Ryan Fortin, Mark Dong, Andrew J. Leenheer, Genevieve Clark, Gerald Gilbert, Matt Eichenfield, Dirk Englund
摘要: Nature, Published online: 11 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-025-10038-6A monolithically integrated photonic ski-jump enables scalable, diffraction-limited 2D beam scanning from photonic chips, achieving ultrahigh spot rates, compact footprints and applications spanning displays, sensing and quantum photonics.

标题: Photonic ‘ski jump’ steers light beam from silicon chip
摘要: Nature, Published online: 11 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00489-wChip-based beam scanners use tiny electrically controlled cantilevers instead of moving mirrors to control the direction of light projected into free space.
